events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need respond raw JSON only. Need parse scenario. Task: Compliance check LOTO. Scenario: Closeout photos for Lockout/Tagout show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, terminations shown for element are in place, and inspection card has no open correction note. Reference material OSHA 1910.147. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Given described field condition positive, no defects. But LOTO is about procedures for controlling hazardous energy during servicing; 'closeout photos' of installed equipment maybe lock boxes/tags? We have limited but all evidence indicates compliance. Need choose decision pass, risk low, work_stage rough-complete, percent_complete maybe 90? Condition none. Findings empty? Actions empty? Rationale references. Ensure JSON valid.
